analysis.summary: President Trump announced a two-week conditional ceasefire with Iran, suspending planned U.S. (and Israeli) military strikes contingent on Iran reopening the Strait of Hormuz. The announcement came less than two hours before Trump's stated deadline and was accompanied by Pakistani diplomatic intermediation. Markets reacted positively with oil prices falling and stock futures rising, while questions remained about Iran's actual concessions and the durability of the agreement.

stories.headline: Artemis II crew returns from lunar mission with historic far-side moon photos

analysis.summary: The Artemis II crew completed a historic lunar flyby, looping around the far side of the moon and returning toward Earth. The mission produced the first-ever photos of Earth taken from the moon's far side, and the four astronauts became the first humans to view parts of the lunar far side with the naked eye. NASA released the images on Tuesday as the crew made their way home.
